User

Refactor the auth module, unify error types and add tests.

Assistant

Analyzing the current file structure:

bash tree src/auth
src/auth/
├── interfaces.ts
├── session.ts
├── errors.ts
├── middleware.ts
└── index.ts

Found 3 issues: scattered interfaces, 5 different error classes, session coupled with auth logic.

User

Go ahead, unify the interfaces first.

Assistant
edit src/auth/interfaces.ts
Unified IAuthResponse, ITokenPayload, ISession into IAuthModule.

Interfaces consolidated. Moving to error types next.
